name: Mayor Thomas Aldebrand
title: Mayor of Goldenhaven
description: A silver-tongued administrator who keeps Goldenhaven's merchant princes from each other's throats. Today his usual composure is cracked by worry.

greeting.first_time: Ah — a stranger, but a sturdy one. I am Mayor Thomas. Forgive my distraction; I am a man with a problem and few I can trust.
greeting.returning: Welcome back to the Guild Hall. The city remains in your debt.

main_menu.text: How may I help you — or you, me?

ask_about_city.text: Goldenhaven runs on trade and trust. The merchant princes squabble, but gold keeps the peace. Mostly.
